# policy-overlays

RBAC policy.csv, default, scopes, and named policy overlays

!!! tip "Direction: `roundtrip`"

| | |
| --- | --- |
| Direction | `roundtrip` |
| Path | `testdata/cases/rbac/policy-overlays` |

## Input

### `argocd-rbac-cm.yaml`

```yaml
apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: argocd-rbac-cm
data:
  policy.default: role:readonly
  policy.csv: |
    p, role:org-admin, applications, *, */*, allow
  policy.extra.csv: |
    p, role:extra, applications, get, */*, allow
  scopes: '[groups]'
```

## Expected ArgoCDConfiguration

### `configuration.yaml`

```yaml
apiVersion: argoproj.io/v1alpha1
kind: ArgoCDConfiguration
metadata:
  name: argocd-config
  namespace: argocd
spec:
  server:
    rbac:
      default: role:readonly
      policyCSV: |
        p, role:org-admin, applications, *, */*, allow
      policyOverlays:
      - csv: |
          p, role:extra, applications, get, */*, allow
        name: extra
      scopes:
      - groups
```

## Expected ConfigMaps

### `argocd-cm.yaml`

```yaml
apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: argocd-cm
  namespace: argocd
```

### `argocd-cmd-params-cm.yaml`

```yaml
apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: argocd-cmd-params-cm
  namespace: argocd
```

### `argocd-rbac-cm.yaml`

```yaml
apiVersion: v1
data:
  policy.csv: |
    p, role:org-admin, applications, *, */*, allow
  policy.default: role:readonly
  policy.extra.csv: |
    p, role:extra, applications, get, */*, allow
  scopes: '- groups'
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: argocd-rbac-cm
  namespace: argocd
```

  message: no source ConfigMap provided; labels/annotations cannot be preserved
  severity: warn
